name: io.github.BilliumHQ/billium
title: Billium
description: Official Billium MCP server: manage crypto invoices, payments, and webhooks from any MCP host.

environmentVariables.name: BILLIUM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Secret API key (sk_...), from the dashboard under Settings → Developer → API keys.

environmentVariables.name: BILLIUM_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (testing / staging environments).
